creator: bpurgar@gmail.com
text: Confirmed .. same problem after fresh install on new laptop. But there is also problem with gnome-control-settings user tab. It crashed gnome-control-settings  and if u try to start new instance of gnome-control-center nothing happends. Workaround is to delete in .config/dconf/user file and then gnome-control-center works again but problem is back again if u click on user tab.
